name: SentinelOne
description: This app integrates with the SentinelOne Singularity platform to perform prevention, detection, remediation, and forensic endpoint management tasks

actions.name: Block Hash
actions.description: Add a file hash to the global blocklist

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Hash of a file to block

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description

parameters.name: os_family
parameters.description: OS Family

actions.name: Unblock Hash
actions.description: Remove a hash from the global blocklist

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Hash of a file to remove from the blocklist

actions.name: Quarantine Device
actions.description: Quarantine an endpoint

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to quarantine

actions.name: Unquarantine Device
actions.description: Unquarantine an endpoint

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to unquarantine

actions.name: Mitigate Threat
actions.description: Mitigate an identified threat

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The threat ID

parameters.name: action
parameters.description: Allowed values include: kill, quarantine, un-quarantine, remediate and rollback-remediation

actions.name: Abort Scan
actions.description: Stop a Full Disk Scan on endpoint/agent

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to abort scan

actions.name: Shutdown Endpoint
actions.description: Shutdown an endpoint

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to shutdown

actions.name: Broadcast Message
actions.description: Send a Message through the Agents that users can see

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to broadcast Message

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message

actions.name: Get File
actions.description: Fetch files from endpoints to analyze the root of threats

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: The file path of an endpoint

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to fetch file

actions.name: Fetch Firewall Rules
actions.description: Fetch the firewall rules

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to fetch firewall rules

actions.name: Fetch Firewall Logs
actions.description: Fetch the firewall logs

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to fetch firewall logs

actions.name: Scan Endpoint
actions.description: Start a Full Disk Scan on endpoint/agent

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to scan

actions.name: Get Endpoint Info
actions.description: Get detailed information about an endpoint/agent

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to get information

actions.name: Get Threat Info
actions.description: Get detailed information about a threat

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

actions.name: List Applications
actions.description: Get the applications, and their data, installed on endpoints

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to get applications

actions.name: Get Cves
actions.description: Get known CVEs for applications that are installed on endpoints with Application Risk-enabled Agents

actions.name: Get Devicecontrol Events
actions.description: Get the data of Device Control events on Windows and macOS endpoints

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint to get information

actions.name: List Firewall Rules
actions.description: Get the Firewall Control rules for a scope specified

actions.name: Create Firewall Rule
actions.description: Create a Firewall Control rule

parameters.name: rule_name
parameters.description: The name of the firewall rule

parameters.name: tag_ids
parameters.description: Tag ID (comma separated values)

parameters.name: description
parameters.description: Description

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Type of the remote host

parameters.name: value
parameters.description: Value of the remote host

actions.name: Hash Reputation
actions.description: Get the reputation of a hash, given the required SHA1

parameters.name: hash
parameters.description: Hash of a file to get the reputation

actions.name: Get Threat Notes
actions.description: Get the threat notes

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

actions.name: Add Threat Note
actions.description: Add a threat note to multiple threats

parameters.name: s1_threat_ids
parameters.description: The S1 Threat IDs for specific threats (comma separated values)

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Threat Note text

actions.name: Export Threat Timeline
actions.description: Export a threat's timeline

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

actions.name: Export Mitigation Report
actions.description: Export the mitigation report of threat

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

actions.name: Export Threats
actions.description: Export data of threats

parameters.name: ip_hostname
parameters.description: The IP or hostname of an endpoint

actions.name: Fetch Threat File
actions.description: Fetch a file associated with the threat

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

parameters.name: password
parameters.description: Password

actions.name: Update Threat Analystverdict
actions.description: Change the verdict of a threat, as determined by a Console user

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

parameters.name: analyst_verdict
parameters.description: Analyst verdict

actions.name: Get Threat Timeline
actions.description: Get a threat's timeline

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

actions.name: Update Threat Incident
actions.description: Update the incident details of a threat

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

parameters.name: analyst_verdict
parameters.description: Analyst verdict

parameters.name: incident_status
parameters.description: A specific incident status

actions.name: Download From Cloud
actions.description: Download threat file from cloud

parameters.name: s1_threat_id
parameters.description: The S1 Threat ID for a specific threat

actions.name: On Poll
actions.description: Callback action for the on_poll ingest functionality
